description: Generic DynamicOut op job — discover→map→collect via Python callables. Parallel fan-out without catalog overhead.

discover_callable_path.label: Discover Callable Path
discover_callable_path.description: 'module:function' that returns a list of items (each item is passed to the process callable)

discover_kwargs.label: Discover Kwargs
discover_kwargs.description: kwargs passed to the discover callable

process_callable_path.label: Process Callable Path
process_callable_path.description: 'module:function' that takes one item and returns a result

process_kwargs.label: Process Kwargs
process_kwargs.description: extra kwargs merged into each process call

collect_callable_path.label: Collect Callable Path
collect_callable_path.description: Optional 'module:function' that takes the list of results and returns the final value

mapping_key_field.label: Mapping Key Field
mapping_key_field.description: If items are dicts, use this field as the DynamicOutput mapping_key (stable per-item retries). None = use the index.

max_concurrent_tag_value.label: Max Concurrent Tag Value
max_concurrent_tag_value.description: If set, applies tag {'dagster/concurrency_key': <value>} to the process op so an instance-level concurrency limit governs fan-out parallelism.

fail_on_empty.label: Fail On Empty
fail_on_empty.description: Fail the job if discover returns no items
